description: Triggers for multi-step deep web research with source synthesis, citations, skeptical evaluation, confidence/gap analysis, and optional dense/frontier research

queries.query: Research the competitive landscape for B2B project management software
Do a deep dive into the current state of EU AI regulation
Research recent funding rounds and market trends in climate tech
Comprehensive research report on remote work productivity statistics
Deep research on the top ML frameworks and their adoption trends in 2025
Research and synthesize what experts say about product-led growth vs sales-led
Investigate the market for mental health apps — players, funding, user trends
Multi-source research on emerging supply chain technologies
Research how different companies have approached pricing strategy for APIs
Do a thorough investigation into customer success best practices for SaaS
Deep research and compare the evidence for remote work productivity claims, including source disagreements
Build a cited research brief on AI coding agents with confidence levels and gaps
Use dense deep-research with a frontier model to produce a Perplexity-like evidence report
Run maximum-depth research with parallel agents and a citation audit on enterprise RAG platforms
Write a Python script to scrape this website
Summarize this YouTube video I'll share
Help me write a cover letter for a data analyst role
Transcribe my voice memo from this morning
Create a product roadmap for Q2
Fix the bug in my API endpoint
Write a blog post about machine learning
Explain how neural networks work conceptually
Create a resume for a software engineering role
Help me prepare for my upcoming presentation
Give me a quick answer: what is RAG?
Rewrite this paragraph with citations I already have
